name: Nutty Plum Crumble
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the whole wheat flour, rolled oats, and raw cane sugar in a bowl.
2. Rub in the vegan margarine and peanut butter until well combined.
3. Slice the plums into thin pieces.
4. Place the sliced plums in a baking dish with the water.
5. Sprinkle the crumble mixture evenly over the plums.
6. Bake at 375°F (180°C) for Gas Mark 5 for approximately half an hour, or until lightly browned on top.
